revision.comment: 1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (7 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Otherworlds]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
{{Commonscat}} {{Cat main|Otherworld}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Afterlife|Places]]
[[Category:Places by type]] }} [[Category:Categories with 6 members]]
[[en:Category:Afterlife places]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:死後の世界]] [[ar:Category:أماكن حياة بعد الموت]] [[ary:Category:بلايص د لحياة مور لموت]] [[arz:Category:اللوكشين حياه بعد الموت]] [[az:Category:Axirət dünyaları]] [[ba:Category:Теге донъя]] [[be_x_old:Category:Тагасьветныя мясьціны]] [[be:Category:Замагільныя светы]] [[bn:Category:পরলৌকিক স্থান]] [[commons:Category:Afterlife places]] [[da:Category:Efterlivssteder]] [[eo:Category:Postmortaj lokoj]] [[es:Category:Lugares de ultratumba]] [[eu:Category:Beste munduko lekuak]] [[fa:Category:جاهای پس از مرگ]] [[fi:Category:Vainajalat]] [[fr:Category:Séjour des morts]] [[it:Category:Luoghi dell'aldilà]] [[ko:Category:사후 세계]] [[mk:Category:Задгробни места]] [[nn:Category:Dødsrike]] [[oc:Category:Sejorn dels mòrts]] [[ro:Category:Locuri de după moarte]] [[ru:Category:Загробные миры]] [[sv:Category:Dödsriken]] [[th:Category:สถานที่หลังความตาย]] [[tl:Category:Mga lugar ng kabilang buhay]] [[tr:Category:Ölümden sonra yaşam yerleri]] [[uk:Category:Потойбічні місця]] [[ur:Category:بعد از حیات مقامات]] [[vi:Category:Thế giới sau khi chết]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:Sí-āu ê sè-kài]] [[zh:Category:死後世界]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
revision.text:
{{Commonscat}} {{Cat main|Otherworld}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Afterlife|Places]]
[[Category:Places by type]] }} [[Category:Categories with 6 members]]
[[en:Category:Afterlife places]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:死後の世界]] [[ar:Category:أماكن حياة بعد الموت]] [[ary:Category:بلايص د لحياة مور لموت]] [[arz:Category:اللوكشين حياه بعد الموت]] [[az:Category:Axirət dünyaları]] [[ba:Category:Теге донъя]] [[be_x_old:Category:Тагасьветныя мясьціны]] [[be:Category:Замагільныя светы]] [[bn:Category:পরলৌকিক স্থান]] [[commons:Category:Afterlife places]] [[da:Category:Efterlivssteder]] [[eo:Category:Postmortaj lokoj]] [[es:Category:Lugares de ultratumba]] [[eu:Category:Beste munduko lekuak]] [[fa:Category:جاهای پس از مرگ]] [[fi:Category:Vainajalat]] [[fr:Category:Séjour des morts]] [[it:Category:Luoghi dell'aldilà]] [[ko:Category:사후 세계]] [[mk:Category:Задгробни места]] [[nn:Category:Dødsrike]] [[oc:Category:Sejorn dels mòrts]] [[ro:Category:Locuri de după moarte]] [[ru:Category:Загробные миры]] [[sv:Category:Dödsriken]] [[th:Category:สถานที่หลังความตาย]] [[tl:Category:Mga lugar ng kabilang buhay]] [[tr:Category:Ölümden sonra yaşam yerleri]] [[uk:Category:Потойбічні місця]] [[ur:Category:بعد از حیات مقامات]] [[vi:Category:Thế giới sau khi chết]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:Sí-āu ê sè-kài]] [[zh:Category:死後世界]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6852367)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{commonscat}} {{Catmore}} {{citation needed|しこのせかい}} {{Commonscat}} {{Cat main|Otherworld}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:死後の世界}} {{translated page|ja|Category:死後の世界|version=101519990}} {{wikidata link|Q6852367}} <!--interwikis--> [[ar:Category:أماكن حياة بعد الموت]] [[ary:Category:بلايص د لحياة مور لموت]] [[arz:Category:اللوكشين حياه بعد الموت]] [[az:Category:Axirət dünyaları]] [[ba:Category:Теге донъя]] [[be:Category:Замагільныя светы]] [[bn:Category:পরলৌকিক স্থান]] [[co:commons:Category:Afterlife places]] [[da:Category:Efterlivssteder]] [[en:Category:Afterlife places]] [[eo:Category:Postmortaj lokoj]] [[es:Category:Lugares de ultratumba]] [[eu:Category:Beste munduko lekuak]] [[fa:Category:جاهای پس از مرگ]] [[fi:Category:Vainajalat]] [[fr:Category:Séjour des morts]] [[it:Category:Luoghi dell'aldilà]] [[ja:Category:死後の世界]] [[ko:Category:사후 세계]] [[mk:Category:Задгробни места]] [[nn:Category:Dødsrike]] [[oc:Category:Sejorn dels mòrts]] [[ro:Category:Locuri de după moarte]] [[ru:Category:Загробные миры]] [[sv:Category:Dödsriken]] [[th:Category:สถานที่หลังความตาย]] [[tl:Category:Mga lugar ng kabilang buhay]] [[tr:Category:Ölümden sonra yaşam yerleri]] [[uk:Category:Потойбічні місця]] [[ur:Category:بعد از حیات مقامات]] [[vi:Category:Thế giới sau khi chết]] [[zh-min-nan:Category:Sí-āu ê sè-kài]] [[zh:Category:死後世界]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTbe_x_old:Category:Тагасьветныя мясьціны]] [[Category:Afterlife|Places]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Places by type]]
